<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="qsin8yrxsdFWy4jrbTiW"> <mxGraphModel dx="3207" dy="2357" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart LR
 Dev[Developer] --> FB[Feature Branch]
 FB --> PR[Pull Request]
 PR --> CI[GitHub Actions: CI]
 
 subgraph CI_Process [CI Pipeline]
 direction TB
 B[Build Docker Image]
 P[Push Image to GHCR]
 V1[Verify Build]
 end
 
 CI --> B & P & V1
 B & P & V1 --> Merge[Merge into main]
 Merge --> CD[GitHub Actions: CD]
 
 subgraph CD_Process [CD Pipeline]
 direction TB
 Pull[docker compose pull]
 Up[docker compose up -d]
 V2[Verify Deployment]
 end
 
 CD --> Pull & Up & V2
 Pull & Up & V2 --> App[Running Application]

 style CI_Process fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
 style CD_Process fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-dasharray: 5 5",
 "config": null

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(249, 249, 249), rgb(23, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(0, 0, 0));
